31:

200:                 end else begin
201:                    state_d = PassChkValid;
202:                 end  
203:             end
204:         endcase
205: 
206:         // update_dr means we got another request but we didn't finish
207:         // the one in progress, this state is sticky
208:         if (update_dr && state_q != Idle) begin
209:             error_dmi_busy = 1'b1;
210:         end
211: 
212:         // if capture_dr goes high while we are in the read state
213:         // or in the corresponding wait state we are not giving back a valid word
214:         // -> throw an error
215:         if (capture_dr && state_q inside {Read, WaitReadValid}) begin
216:             error_dmi_busy = 1'b1;
217:         end
218: 
219:         if (error_dmi_busy) begin
220:             error_d = DMIBusy;
221:         end
222:         // clear sticky error flag
223:         if (dmi_reset && dtmcs_select) begin
224:             error_d = DMINoError;
225:         end
226:     end
227: 
228:     // shift register
229:     assign dmi_tdo = dr_q[0];
230: 
231:     always_comb begin
232:         dr_d    = dr_q;
233: 
234:         if (capture_dr) begin
235:             if (dmi_access) begin
236:                 if (error_q == DMINoError && !error_dmi_busy) begin
237:                     dr_d = {address_q, data_q, DMINoError};
238:                 // DMI was busy, report an error
239:                 end else if (error_q == DMIBusy || error_dmi_busy) begin
240:                     dr_d = {address_q, data_q, DMIBusy};
241:                 end
242:             end
243:         end
244: 
245:         if (shift_dr) begin
246:             if (dmi_access) dr_d = {dmi_tdi, dr_q[$bits(dr_q)-1:1]};
247:         end
248: 
249:         if (test_logic_reset) begin
250:             dr_d = '0;
251:         end
252:     end
253: 
254:     always_ff @(posedge tck_i or negedge trst_ni) begin
255:         if (!trst_ni) begin
256:             dr_q      <= '0;
257:             state_q   <= Idle;
258:             address_q <= '0;
259:             data_q    <= '0;
260:             error_q   <= DMINoError;
261:         end else begin
262:             dr_q      <= dr_d;
263:             state_q   <= state_d;
264:             address_q <= address_d;
265:             data_q    <= data_d;
266:             error_q   <= error_d;
267:         end
268:     end
269:

271:     // TAP

273:     dmi_jtag_tap #(
274:         .IrLength (5),
275:         .IdcodeValue(IdcodeValue)
276:     ) i_dmi_jtag_tap (
277:         .tck_i,
278:         .tms_i,
279:         .trst_ni,
280:         .td_i,
281:         .td_o,
282:         .tdo_oe_o,
283:         .testmode_i         ( testmode_i       ),
284:         .test_logic_reset_o ( test_logic_reset ),
285:         .shift_dr_o         ( shift_dr         ),
286:         .update_dr_o        ( update_dr        ),
287:         .capture_dr_o       ( capture_dr       ),
288:         .dmi_access_o       ( dmi_access       ),
289:         .dtmcs_select_o     ( dtmcs_select     ),
290:         .dmi_reset_o        ( dmi_reset        ),
291:         .dmi_error_i        ( error_q          ),
292:         .dmi_tdi_o          ( dmi_tdi          ),
293:         .dmi_tdo_i          ( dmi_tdo          )
294:     );

297:     // CDC
298:     // ---------

303:         .jtag_dmi_req_i    ( dmi_req          ),

312:         .core_dmi_req_o    ( dmi_req_o        ),
313:         .core_dmi_valid_o  ( dmi_req_valid_o  ),
314:         .core_dmi_ready
